title: polygala oblongata
intro: Polygala oblongata, also known as Yuan Zhi or Chinese foxglove flower, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Polygala oblongata include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Polygala oblongata is often used in combination with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are said to promote relaxation, improve respiratory function, and support overall well-being.
